label: plain_text
text:
Ans.
For even number of cells say,2,4,6,... t
the number of supercells would be respectively,
2/2 =1,4/2 =2,6/2=3,...
For odd number of cells , say 1
1,3,5,7,... the number of supercells would be respectively
(1+1)/2= 1, (3+1)/2 = 2, (5+1)/2= 3,(7+1)/2 = 4,...
To get the maximum number ofsupercells, we have to start by filling the first cell
as
super cell & then fill alternately.
